channel.title: Sourav's Portfolio
channel.description: Thoughts on data science, policy and systems.

item.title: Your Netflix auto-payment is not AI
item.description: Automated payments and AI agents are not the same thing — they work differently, fail differently, and deserve very different levels of trust.

item.title: Choropleth Maps Decoded: History, Pitfalls and Better Alternatives
item.description: Choropleth maps are powerful tools for visualizing regional data—but they're often misused. Learn their origins, common pitfalls, and how to make smarter choices with normalized data and better alternatives.
